message:
Add bitwise augmented assignment &=, |=, ^=, <<=, >>=

- New tokens: AmpersandEq, PipeEq, CaretEq, LtLtEq, GtGtEq
- Parser: Maps to BitAnd, BitOr, BitXor, LShift, RShift ops
- Codegen: Proper shift handling with std.math.shl/shr
- Complex literals and bitwise NOT already worked

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,11 @@ pub const TokenType = enum {
     DoubleSlashEq,
     PercentEq,
     StarStarEq,
+    AmpersandEq, // &=
+    PipeEq, // |=
+    CaretEq, // ^=
+    LtLtEq, // <<=
+    GtGtEq, // >>=
     ColonEq, // Walrus operator :=
 
     // Delimiters
